subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and its contents were noted. Ever do the feelings of the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و از تفاصیل اطلاع حاصل گردید همیشه تاثرات قلب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for unity, @business; financial; property matters, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
